mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `orders` WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM `orders` WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM `orders` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `orders` ( order_no, goods_id, goods_title, goods_price, seller_id, buyer_id, buyer_name, buyer_phone, buyer_address, remark, status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsTitle}, #{goodsPrice}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerPhone}, #{buyerAddress}, #{remark}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE `orders`
status = #{status}, buyer_name = #{buyerName}, buyer_phone = #{buyerPhone}, buyer_address = #{buyerAddress}, remark = #{remark}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, receive_time = #{receiveTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
